summary: The diff implements a comprehensive visual theme refresh across all required components. Colors, typography, spacing, and decorative styling have been updated with a cohesive warm spice/terracotta palette (burgundy, saffron, cream) and Playfair Display/DM Sans typography system. All content, links, images, basket functionality, and navigation structure appear preserved. The implementation covers all 11 listed components. No files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx were modified.
